untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (flag formation, pole height, nearby resistance/support proximity) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal specifically requires identifying: (1) flag pattern formation, (2) proximity of overhead resistance or underlying support, and (3) throwback/pullback occurrence — all of which require custom pattern detection logic beyond standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Used ADX > 25 as proxy for bull market trend condition and sma_20 crossbelow as exit signal. However, the core signal logic regarding flag pattern formation, resistance/support proximity assessment, and throwback avoidance cannot be properly translated into structured indicator-based rules. A pattern recognition module or custom candle analysis would be required.
